scores.reliability_reasoning: The agent successfully retrieved and verified the transcript using multiple steps, cross-referenced data, and handled the task without errors.
scores.security_reasoning: No security issues detected; all tool calls were appropriate and followed defined parameters.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: The agent strictly followed the task instructions, including verification steps and proper tool usage.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: The plan was well-structured, efficiently breaking down the task into logical steps with proper tool utilization.
